ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "top1" REAL /* Top-1 accuracy of the model */,
  "top1_err" REAL /* Top-1 error rate of the model */,
  "top5" REAL /* Top-5 accuracy of the model */,
  "top5_err" REAL /* Top-5 error rate of the model */,
  "param_count" REAL /* Number of parameters in the model */,
  "img_size" INTEGER /* Size of the input images */,
  "crop_pct" REAL /* Crop percentage for image processing */,
  "interpolation" TEXT /* Interpolation method used for image resizing */,
  "top1_diff" REAL /* Difference in top-1 accuracy compared to a baseline model */,
  "top5_diff" REAL /* Difference in top-5 accuracy compared to a baseline model */,
  "rank_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in rank compared to a baseline model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "model_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first model in the comparison */,
  "model_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second model in the comparison */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric being compared */,
  "metric_difference" REAL /* Difference in the performance metric between the two models */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_2") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_1") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the model was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modelDocumentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., README, user guide) */,
  "doc_content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation */,
  "doc_format" TEXT /* Format of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modelDocumentation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric used for ranking */,
  "rank_value" INTEGER /* Rank value of the model */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was calculated */,
  "ranking_description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_rankings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
